copy_alert_empty: There's nothing to copy yet. Please select the metrics first.
group_title_vulnerable_system_impact: Metric 1 - Base metric, part 2 (Vulnerable System Impact Metrics)
group_title_subsequent_system_impact: Metric 1 - Base metric, part 3 (Subsequent System Impact Metrics)
group_title_environmental: Metric 3 - Environmental metric (Environmental - Security requirements Metrics)
metric_av_step: Step 1: In which security zone is the identified vulnerability located?
metric_ac_step: Step 2: What type of complexity in security mechanisms must the attacker bypass?
metric_at_step: Step 3: Does the attack require specific conditions to be carried out?
metric_pr_step: Step 4: What level of required permissions does the attacker need before launching the attack?
metric_ui_step: Step 5: Does the attacker need help from another person to carry out the attack?
metric_vc_step: Step 6: What will be the degree of confidentiality impact on the security measure?
metric_vi_step: Step 7: What will be the degree of integrity impact on the security measure?
metric_va_step: Step 8: What will be the degree of availability impact on the security measure?
metric_sc_step: Step 9: What will be the degree of confidentiality impact on the asset affected by exploiting the vulnerability of the security measure?
metric_si_step: Step 10: What will be the degree of integrity impact on the asset affected by exploiting the vulnerability of the security measure?
metric_sa_step: Step 11: What will be the degree of availability impact on the asset affected by exploiting the vulnerability of the security measure?
metric_s_step: Step 12: To what extent can exploiting this vulnerability affect human health/life?
metric_cr_step: Step 13: How critical is the confidentiality of the affected asset (via exploitation of the vulnerability) in the given environment?
metric_ir_step: Step 14: How critical is the integrity of the affected asset (via exploitation of the vulnerability) in the given environment?
metric_ar_step: Step 15: How critical is the availability of the affected asset (via exploitation of the vulnerability) in the given environment?
metric_e_step: Step 16: What is the status and prevalence of methods used to exploit this vulnerability?
ui_option_none: No interaction from another person required
ui_option_limited: Limited interaction from another person required
ui_option_active: Active interaction from another person required
